description: ZFX is a Forex & CFD broker and part of the Zeal Group, providing access to global markets including Forex, indices, commodities, metals, and stocks through a transparent ECN/STP infrastructure. Regulated in the United Kingdom (FCA) and Seychelles (FSA), the company focuses on fast execution, competitive spreads, and multi-asset trading.

summary.spread: Starting from 0.2 pips on ECN accounts; wider on Standard/Cent accounts
summary.commission: ECN usually incurs a commission (value depends on the instrument)
summary.leverage: Up to 1:2000 for certain accounts/entities (temporary regulations may lower leverage during major economic events)
summary.depositWithdrawal: Cards, bank transfers, e-wallets; processing time depends on the method

keyAdvantages: Highly competitive spreads on ECN accounts
Regulated and backed by Zeal Group
Account options ranging from beginners to pros (Cent to ECN)
disadvantages: ECN minimum deposit is relatively high
IB rebates are not publicly transparent
Existing reports of user complaints (caution advised)

faqs.question: Is ZFX safe?
faqs.answer: ZFX operates under Zeal Group and lists FCA & FSA regulations for group entities; verification of the specific local entity is required.

faqs.question: What is the minimum deposit?
faqs.answer: Starts at $15 for Cent/Mini; $50 for Standard; ECN is generally $500+ (check account availability in your region).

faqs.question: Is there a demo account?
faqs.answer: Yes, MT4/MT5 demos are available on the ZFX website.

faqs.question: Is there an IB program?
faqs.answer: Yes, there is a partnership/IB program available; rebate details are subject to negotiation.
